我的tke kubeconfig是:
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    certificate-authority-data: 
    server: https://172.21.128.44
  name: cls-g8kurryp
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: cls-g8kurryp
    user: "100000881922"
  name: cls-g8kurryp-100000881922-context-default
current-context: cls-g8kurryp-100000881922-context-default
kind: Config
preferences: {}
users:
- name: "100000881922"
  user:
    client-certificate-data: 
    client-key-data: 


配置:
export KUBECONFIG=$KUBECONFIG:$HOME/Downloads/cls-g8kurryp-config

kubectl config --kubeconfig=$HOME/Downloads/cls-g8kurryp-config get-contexts 
kubectl config --kubeconfig=$HOME/Downloads/cls-g8kurryp-config use-context cls-g8kurryp-100000881922-context-default

TKE中的GPU node是:172.21.80.123

帮我创建一个ingress,并配置内网CLB

通过本机pdf/路径下的文档,对其进行压测
